name: Read and Write Multiple File Formats
description: Export data to CSV, Parquet, and JSON formats, then read them back into tables

checks.name: All three reimport tables exist
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('csv_reimport','parquet_reimport','json_reimport');
checks.description: Tables csv_reimport, parquet_reimport, and json_reimport must all be created

checks.name: csv_reimport has 4 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM csv_reimport;
checks.description: CSV reimport should have the same 4 rows as the original

checks.name: parquet_reimport has 4 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM parquet_reimport;
checks.description: Parquet reimport should have the same 4 rows as the original

checks.name: parquet_reimport amounts sum to 751.50
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total FROM parquet_reimport;
